items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm

items.name_en: Sakura Pink in stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Sakura Pink in stock!!️
D-joy latest mini series. If micro is too small and small is too big, look here. The new mini size fits large phones perfectly. This size looks more refined, a major hit. The bag comes with two shoulder straps and multiple carrying styles, looking beautiful and chic. Classic quilted design paired with cowhide patent leather, elegant and fashionable, a daily essential.
size:19*5.5*10.5cm
